# Breaking Changes Classification Guide

Full guide: https://github.com/Azure/azure-sdk-for-python/blob/main/doc/dev/mgmt/sdk-breaking-changes-guide.md

Read the guide above to understand how to classify and resolve each breaking change during TypeSpec migration. It also exists locally at `C:/dev/azure-sdk-for-python/doc/dev/mgmt/sdk-breaking-changes-guide.md`.
